metadata.siteTitleDefault: AI Internal Tools — AI automation for operational businesses
metadata.siteDescription: Practical AI systems and automations for operational teams: workflow automation, agents, internal tools, and knowledge assistants. Try demos, then scope custom work.

home.title: AI Internal Tools — AI automation for operational businesses
home.description: Practical AI systems and automations for operational teams: workflow automation, agents, internal tools, and knowledge assistants. Try demos, then scope custom work.

about.title: About
about.description: Andrei Alexandru Gabriel — React, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Vercel; applied AI (LLM integrations, agents, RAG), n8n and workflow automation. Aviation QA background, PhD predictive maintenance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Reach out about a workflow from the site or request a custom automation—we'll reply with clear next steps.

community.title: Community Waitlist
community.description: Join the waitlist for an operator hub with applied AI tools, templates, and peers. Founding 1,000 members get free access plus Marketing Audit and Automation Audit at launch.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to access automation demos with limited demo credits (coming soon).

aiNews.title: AI News
aiNews.description: Weekly AI news for business owners—filtered signal, practical takeaways for operations, marketing, productivity, and competitive advantage.

marketingAudit.title: Marketing Audit
marketingAudit.description: AI-powered marketing audit for your website. Discovers key pages, scores messaging, CRO, SEO, positioning, and trust — with actionable recommendations.

automationAudit.title: Automation Audit
automationAudit.description: AI-powered automation opportunity scan. Infers business model, detects visible integrations, and recommends workflow automations.

useCases.title: Use Cases
useCases.description: Workflows we automate most often for operational teams — from social media to custom automations tailored to your stack.

aiSocialMediaAssistant.title: AI Social Media Assistant
aiSocialMediaAssistant.description: Turn Google Sheets ideas into on-brand social posts. AI generates content per channel, you approve and schedule, then posts go live automatically on LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and X.

footer.copyright: © {year} AI Internal Tools. All rights reserved.

hero.description: We design and implement AI-driven automations that remove bottlenecks and keep your operations running efficiently at scale.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A clear path from first call to production automation

discovery.title: Discovery call
discovery.body: 30 minutes. You walk us through your current manual processes. We identify what's automatable and map out the workflow

build.title: We design & build
build.body: We design the automation, connect your systems (APIs, webhooks, AI), test everything, and make sure it actually works

live.title: Live & Monitored
live.body: Few days later, it's running. We monitor performance, train your team, and provide ongoing support as your needs evolve

useCases.title: Use cases
useCases.subtitle: Workflows we automate most often for operational teams

toolCategories.title: Pick the workflow that costs you time.

leadRouting.title: Lead routing
leadRouting.description: Score, enrich, assign, and update CRM fields.

knowledgeAssistants.title: Knowledge assistants
knowledgeAssistants.description: Fast answers grounded in your SOPs and docs.

documentWorkflows.title: Document workflows
documentWorkflows.description: Build packets from templates, rules, and CRM data.

dashboards.title: Dashboards
dashboards.description: Rollups and short summaries leadership can scan.

supportCopilots.title: Support copilots
supportCopilots.description: Triage, draft replies, and suggest next steps.

crossToolHandoffs.title: Cross-tool handoffs
crossToolHandoffs.description: Tasks, tickets, and updates triggered automatically.

toolCategories.ctaDescription: Share the process. We'll map what to automate first.

solutionSection.title: From messy process to working system.
solutionSection.description: Start small, prove value quickly, then wire it into the way your team already works.

map.title: Map
map.body: Pinpoint the repeatable workflow and the tools involved.

prototype.title: Prototype
prototype.body: Test the automation pattern with a working demo.

ship.title: Ship
ship.body: Build the agent, app, or integration around your stack.

about.coreStackIntro: Typical delivery setup (including products like PixelPlot on Vercel). Patterns and integrations matter more than listing every model name.
about.alsoIntro: Research, domain, and chain work beyond the core web + AI stack above.
about.letsTalkDescription: Describe a workflow; I'll suggest what to automate first.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Interested in one of our workflows, or need something built around your tools? Pick what fits below and share a few details—we'll reply with clear next steps.

contactForm.name: Name
contactForm.heading: Tell us what you need
contactForm.description: Choose a workflow from the site or select something custom, then add any context that helps us understand your setup.
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Tools you use, what should trigger the automation, what "done" looks like…
contactForm.messagePlaceholderUseCase: Optional — team size, timeline, or anything specific to your business…
contactForm.successDescription: Thanks for reaching out. We'll review your note and get back to you soon.
contactForm.validationCustomWorkflow: Please describe your workflow when selecting something custom.

community.eyebrow: Waitlist · Founding 1,000 get an onboarding bonus
community.heroTitleBefore: AI tools and workflows for operators
community.heroDescription: We're building a member hub with applied AI tools, templates, and peer connection. Join the waitlist, the first 1,000 get free access plus Marketing Audit and Automation Audit included at launch.
community.benefitsIntro: Founding members get the hub plus two audit tools on day one. Join the waitlist now to secure one of the first {limit} spots.
community.joinBadge: Hub launching soon · {limit} founding spots · 2 audit tools included
community.joinDescription: The hub isn't live yet. Reserve your spot and we'll email you when access opens. Founding members get free hub access and an onboarding bonus: full access to our Marketing Audit and Automation Audit tools.

benefits.tools: Marketing & Automation Audits included—scan your site and get actionable reports (founding bonus)
benefits.curated: Curated guidance without hype or tool spam
benefits.networking: Connect with operators solving similar problems

communityForm.name: Name
communityForm.successDescription: Thanks for signing up. You're in line for founding access and the Marketing + Automation Audit onboarding bonus—we'll email you as soon as the hub opens.

login.title: Demo access
login.description: Sign-in for the demo lab is not wired up yet. The goal is simple: create an account, receive a small allocation of demo credits, try selected proof-of-concept tools, then move to a custom automation if you need it in production.
login.note: Authentication will likely use Supabase later; this route is reserved for that flow.

index.description: Each week we filter the noise and explain what matters in AI—why it matters, and how you can use it to improve operations, marketing, productivity, decision-making, and competitive advantage.
index.editionTimelineDescription: Track how AI signal evolved week over week.
index.emptyDescriptionBefore: Add a weekly JSON file in

notFound.title: Edition not found
notFound.description: This weekly briefing doesn't exist or isn't published yet.

timeline.signalEvolutionDescription: Each node is one edition — bar length reflects signal strength that week.

pagesTable.underfilled: Only {filled} of {max} page slots could be filled — the site may use client-rendered navigation, block crawlers, or expose few public HTML routes. Common paths were probed automatically where possible.

pagesTable.extraDiscoveredMany: {count} additional pages discovered but not included in this audit (limited to top {max}).

apiErrors.noPageContent: Could not fetch any page content to audit

automationAudit.scopeNote: This audit is based only on what we could learn from your public website. We cannot see your internal processes, private systems, or how your team works day to day — suggestions describe practical opportunities inferred from your online presence.

form.helperText: Scans your public site to infer business model, detect visible tools, and recommend automation directions.

progress.durationHint: Usually takes 45–90 seconds. Keep this tab open.

teaser.ariaLabel: Audit complete. Overall score {score} out of 100.

executiveSummary.title: Executive Summary
executiveSummary.description: The headline takeaway in plain language.

businessSummary.title: Business Summary
businessSummary.description: What you appear to sell, who you serve, and your core offer.

scoreOverview.title: Automation Readiness
scoreOverview.description: How much room there is to automate key areas of your business. See Findings below for details.

yourWebsite.title: What We Found on Your Website
yourWebsite.description: Signals from your public site and practical automations you could run — or add — based on what we saw.

findings.title: Workflow Findings
findings.description: For each area of your business: what we noticed, why it matters, and how to improve.

recommendations.title: Workflow Recommendations
recommendations.description: Practical automations you could put in place — described as what happens, not how it is built.

quickWins.title: Quick Wins
quickWins.description: High-impact automations you could explore this week.

actions.title: Prioritized Actions
actions.description: Ranked next steps by expected impact.

emptyStates.executiveSummary: No executive summary was generated for this audit.
emptyStates.scoreRationale: We could not find enough on your public website to explain this score in detail.
emptyStates.evidence: No clear signals on the pages we reviewed.
emptyStates.improvements: Book a consulting call to review how this works inside your business — public pages alone were not enough.
emptyStates.detectedTools: No specific signals on your public pages — we still recommend automations in the sections below based on your business type.
